appraisal_events.evidence: « connu... pour un des premiers hôteliers de l'Europe »; « d'une impassibilité et d'une correction extraordinaires »; « véritable généralissime »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator elevates the Director General as an eminent, authoritative figure who commands the room with disciplined control and international prestige.

status_effects.explanation: He is framed as a top European hotelier and commanding presence, which markedly raises his local standing.
